title: How a Man of God Builds Brotherhood When He Doesn't Have It
caption:
You don't do this alone.

But "not alone" doesn't mean a big group. It means two or three men who have your number, know your actual sin, and will pick up when you call at midnight. Smaller than most men think. More costly than most men want.

The barrier isn't finding the right guys — it's making the first awkward move. Walk up. Text first. Hand him something real, and see if he holds it. That's the only way to find out if he's your brother.

"Confess your sins to one another, and pray for one another, that you may be healed." — James 5:16. That doesn't happen across a highlight reel. It happens on a rough Tuesday when neither of you wants to be there.

Find your two or three. Initiate.

—

Comment "brother" and I'll send you the link.

#faith #christianmen #brotherhood #community #godlymen #manofgod #accountability #james #christian #scripture
